title: Ratcraft
description: Ratcraft is a simple fabric modpack for rat fans.
body:
# Rat fans, rejoice!
Ratcraft is a simple fabric modpack for rat fans. :)

### What's included?
This modpack combines CaffeineMC's optimisation mods with Ladysnake's Rat's Mischief.

### How do I get started?
For singleplayer use, you can simply install this modpack like any other modpack you install from Modrinth. If you'd like to use this modpack for multiplayer, Ratcraft has a server that runs this modpack, you can get started by visiting our wiki page.

### Version Compatibility 
Ratcraft uses Semantic Versioning for it's modpack updates (`MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH`). 
- Patch releases with the same Major and Minor version can play together on servers.
- Releases with different Major and Minor versions can NOT play together. The only exception is 0.9 and 1.0.

### Support
Some support is provided for Ratcraft as a modpack. 
- Fully supported versions are 🟢. 
    - On top of helping you setup the client (and maybe the server too), we will accept feature requests, bug fixes and carry any existing codebase into the next version of Minecraft and Ratcraft modpack. 
- Partially supported versions are ⚠️. 
    - We can help you setup the client, but we will advise against setting up a server. 
- Discontinued versions are 🟥. 
    - No support is provided whatsoever, and the version may not be available for download.

| Version | Status |
|---------|--------|
| 1.1.X     | 🟢      |
| 1.0>   | 🟥 |



### Credits 
All these people and mods walked so Ratcraft could run. 
- [Rat's Mischief by Ladysnake](https://ladysnake.org/)
- [GeckoLib by Azuredoom](https://www.azuredoom.com/)
- [Lithium, Sodium and Phosphor by CaffeineMC](https://github.com/CaffeineMC)
- [Fabric Mod Loader and API](https://fabricmc.net)
- [Xaero's Minimap and Worldmap](https://chocolateminecraft.com/minimap2.php)
- [Open Parties and Claims by Xaero](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims)
